cases.title: Spreading activation reaches a linked fact

seed.statement: nginx is the entry point on :80/:443; site configs live on the host in conf.d.
PHP-FPM pools are addressed by container name inside webnet: fastcgi_pass php84:9000.

turns.prompt: set up a new nginx vhost for the project

cases.note: The prompt only names 'nginx'. 'php-fpm' has no direct cue hit but is one hop away via a relates link (weight 0.7 × decay 0.5 = 0.35 ≥ 0.3 threshold), so spreading activation surfaces it. 'redis' is unlinked and stays silent.
